features: PROTECT & REPAIR: Escenti Cool Feet Cracked Heel Cream, protect your feet from damage with Escenti Cool Feet Cracked Heel Cream. Containing a special blend of Urea, Vitamin E and added moisturisers, this cream helps your dry uncomfrotable cracked heel skin become soft and supple.
QUICK & EASY SOFT HEELS: Escenti Cool Feet Cracked Heel Cream is quick and easy to use. Apply a small amount to feet at daily to improve and maintain soft supple skin

FOOT CARE ESSENTIAL: Protect your feet! Escenti Cool Cracked Heel Cream helps your dry skin become soft and supple. Formulated with a menthol and peppermint scent, this cream is easily absorbed while it helps to cool and refresh your aching feet. Search Amazon.co.uk for the Escenti Foot Care range
QUICK CRACKED HEEL REPAIR: Escenti Cool Feet Cracked Heel Cream perfect for visible results. Non-sticky, quick absorbsion, reduces discomfort. Recommended daily use for perfect feet
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: READY TO USE, RE-SEALABLE 100ml TUBE
description: Product Description ESCENTI COOL FEET CRACKED HEEL CREAM, FRAGRANCE ENRICHED Directions Massage gently into feet until cream is completely absorbed. Before use ensure skin is clean and dry. For best results apply morning and night. Safety Warning Use only as directed. For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue if irritation occurs.
